name: Bellett
description:
Bellett was once the prince of a kingdom, until his father visited the Kamabakka Kingdom and returned a woman. As a result, Bellett's kingdom suffered a great loss, which forced him to become a pirate until his eventual imprisonment in Impel Down. Bellett sought revenge against Ivankov for his father's transition, although his revenge plan failed when Ivankov transformed him into a woman.
After Bellett's transformation, Ivankov offered that she could join him and his followers. Instead, Bellett ran off in embarrassment.
